content:
[PROJECT DETAIL] Editorial Canvas Portfolio
Role: Chief Creative Technologist
Year: 2026
Tech Stack: Next.js 16, React Flow, Vercel AI SDK, Ollama (Local RAG)
Quote: "An experimental, AI-native interactive portfolio where users chat with a Digital Twin."

## The Problem
Traditional portfolios are static, rigid, and ultimately fail to demonstrate true AI-native capabilities or agentic coding paradigms in real-time.

## The Solution
Built an interactive, brutalist canvas using React Flow, where a local Ollama model orchestrates autonomous node spawning, layout arrangement, and physics based entirely on fluid user conversation.

## Overview & Impact
This website serves as a live, interactive demonstration of 'Agentic Coding.' By deeply integrating the Vercel AI SDK with custom semantic RAG retrieval, the portfolio acts as a fully-featured digital twin. It is capable of autonomously rendering rich project nodes, hero text, and complex spatial layouts—all wrapped in a highly-polished, brutalist design aesthetic that bridges human interaction and machine orchestration.

metadata.title: Editorial Canvas Portfolio
metadata.quote: An experimental, AI-native interactive portfolio where users chat with a Digital Twin.

content:
[PROJECT DETAIL] RISE ePA+ (Electronic Patient Record)
Role: iOS Developer
Year: 2023
Tech Stack: iOS Native, SwiftUI, gematik Security
Quote: "Connecting patients with doctors and insurance providers safely."

## The Problem
Handling highly sensitive medical data often results in clunky, unapproachable user interfaces that discourage active patient participation and adherence to medical regimens.

## The Solution
Engineered an advanced digital health application that extends the standard German Electronic Patient Record (ePA) with powerful, user-centric features natively on iOS using SwiftUI.

## Overview & Impact
Designed, developed, and maintained complex UI architectures and workflows utilizing modern SwiftUI, ensuring an accessible, highly responsive, and strictly secure patient user experience. The ePA+ ecosystem goes far beyond basic document storage, including a comprehensive Health Diary, Preventive Care Manager, and Vaccination Recommendations. It meets the strict regulatory and security specifications mandated by 'gematik'.

metadata.title: RISE ePA+ (Electronic Patient Record)
metadata.quote: Connecting patients with doctors and insurance providers safely.

content:
[PROJECT DETAIL] Find My Mazda
Role: Lead Developer
Year: 2022
Tech Stack: Vue.js, Elastic Search, Node.js
Quote: "Achieved an 18% increase in overall conversion rate and 30% rise in dealer inquiries."

## The Problem
Traditional vehicle search filters are sterile, confusing, and fail to provide a seamless transition between inspiration and the final purchase.

## The Solution
Architected a Micro-Frontend Vue application integrating a lightning-fast Elastic Search backend to handle real-time inventory filtering and location-based matching.

## Overview & Impact
Replaced traditional sterile search filters with an intuitive, playful dialogue that elegantly guides users. Search results update instantaneously with every input, showcasing accessory customizations and exactly which vehicles are locally available with precise pricing. The platform became a benchmark for customer-oriented online automotive selling.

metadata.title: Find My Mazda
metadata.quote: Achieved an 18% increase in overall conversion rate and 30% rise in dealer inquiries.

content:
[PROJECT DETAIL] Hermes
Role: Lead Architect
Year: 2024
Tech Stack: Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Serverless GPUs, Python, Multi-Agent AI
Quote: "Reduced content production costs by 95% using a serverless multi-agent GPU architecture."

## The Problem
Content production was bogged down by expensive, manual processes and monolithic architectures that struggled to scale efficiently during peak loads.

## The Solution
Designed a multi-agent AI operating system on GCP that automates end-to-end content production. The system employs a highly resilient hub-and-spoke architecture featuring 'Herman' (the orchestrator) and distributed serverless GPU workers.

## Overview & Impact
Hermes revolutionized the production workflow by treating AI agents as modular workers within a serverless ecosystem. By decoupling the orchestrator from the GPU-intensive rendering tasks, we drastically reduced idle time and overhead. The architecture achieved a 95% cost reduction while dramatically increasing throughput, consistency, and reliability across the platform.

metadata.title: Hermes
metadata.quote: Reduced content production costs by 95% using a serverless multi-agent GPU architecture.

content:
[PROJECT DETAIL] MonstoryX
Role: Chief Creative Technologist
Year: 2025
Tech Stack: Unreal Engine 5, Generative AI, C++ / Blueprints, Node.js
Quote: "Transformed children from passive consumers into active digital directors through a Voice-First Generative Loop."

## The Problem
Passive digital consumption is directly causing developmental delays and reducing expressive language skills in young children.

## The Solution
An immersive 3D open-world educational game featuring a real-time Speech-to-Intent pipeline. Children solve quests and direct 'Monster Movies' using their own voice, supported by local on-device transcription models (Qwen).

## Overview & Impact
MonstoryX turns speech into interactive stories, promoting literacy, empathy, and computational thinking. As Co-Founder, I engineered the Voice-To-Intent pipeline and the proprietary `MonstoryReplaySystem` for the Movie Maker mode using custom C++ plugins, with backend multiplayer logic handled via Nakama. We also architected an innovative physical-to-digital asset pipeline: characters were hand-sculpted in Plasticine, processed through Hunyuan 3D AI, and rigged in UE5. This project proves that high-fidelity gaming technology can be leveraged to forge deep, educational human connections.

metadata.title: MonstoryX
metadata.quote: Transformed children from passive consumers into active digital directors through a Voice-First Generative Loop.

content:
[PROJECT DETAIL] Moxis (XiTrust)
Role: Lead Architecture & Engineering
Year: 2024
Tech Stack: Next.js 16, React 19, Python (FastAPI), Ollama
Quote: "Transformed traditionally static, repetitive forms into AI-augmented fluid conversations."

## The Problem
Enterprise digital signature platforms are notoriously rigid, bureaucratic, and extremely frustrating for end-users, burdened by outdated compliance checks and static forms.

## The Solution
Architected a highly scalable monorepo unifying multiple complex applications into a single, cohesive ecosystem. Integrated local LLMs via Ollama to transform data input into an intelligent, conversational flow.

## Overview & Impact
Spearheaded the architectural reinvention of an enterprise e-digital signature platform. Our core objective was to fundamentally prove that complex corporate data systems can feel fluid, intuitive, and human. We built a comprehensive Atomic Design System directly connecting Figma to our codebase. The platform uniquely uses a hybrid approach of geometric CV and Vision Language Models (VLMs) to classify and export form fields from legal contracts. The major achievement was taking an extremely complex, security-critical domain and creating a frontend interface that felt as dynamic, playful, and responsive as the best modern consumer apps.

metadata.title: Moxis (XiTrust)
metadata.quote: Transformed traditionally static, repetitive forms into AI-augmented fluid conversations.

content:
[PROJECT DETAIL] My Mazda App
Role: Lead Developer
Year: 2021
Tech Stack: React Native, iOS & Android
Quote: "The most convenient way to access vehicle documents, history, and manuals on the go."

## The Problem
Owners previously lacked a unified, mobile-first ecosystem to effortlessly track service histories and access crucial vehicle documents.

## The Solution
Architected and developed the 'My Mazda' React Native application for both iOS and Android platforms, unifying service reminders and dealer locating.

## Overview & Impact
Included features like service reminders, interactive dealer locators, and on-demand roadside assistance directly inside the user's pocket, serving as Mazda's official pan-European mobile ecosystem. It significantly bridged the gap between home and the dealership, improving post-purchase customer satisfaction.

metadata.title: My Mazda App
metadata.quote: The most convenient way to access vehicle documents, history, and manuals on the go.

content:
[PROJECT DETAIL] Wagner BIG CITY Pizza (Nestlé)
Role: AR Experience Developer
Year: 2020
Tech Stack: SocialAR (Instagram & TikTok Filters), Facial Recognition, Image Tracking
Quote: "Garnered over 1,000,000 impressions and more than 20,000 documented user reactions."

## The Problem
Revitalizing a traditional brand requires breaking through social media noise, especially among younger consumers, without forcing them to download a dedicated app.

## The Solution
Developed a modular SocialAR campaign containing nine distinct AR experiences published natively to Instagram and TikTok, merging physical product packaging with digital interactions.

## Overview & Impact
Engineered 'hero games' where users controlled the gameplay entirely via facial expressions (winking and nodding). We built an image tracker that recognized the physical pizza boxes in real-time, unlocking surprising Easter eggs directly in the supermarket aisle. The frictionless, no-app entry point led to massive viral sharing.

metadata.title: Wagner BIG CITY Pizza (Nestlé)
metadata.quote: Garnered over 1,000,000 impressions and more than 20,000 documented user reactions.

content:
[PROJECT DETAIL] StopOverfishing (Oceana)
Role: Web Developer & Creative Technologist
Year: 2019
Tech Stack: React & Three.js (WebGL), Node.js & PostgreSQL, Python (Twitter Scraping), AWS
Quote: "Every shared social media post adds a unique fish to a real-time, lively virtual ocean."

## The Problem
Visualizing the abstract scale of environmental action can be difficult, making it hard for individuals to feel their contribution matters in fighting overfishing.

## The Solution
Architected an interactive WebGL experience where users design a low-poly fish with a personal message, linking their engagement to a live, massive virtual ocean synchronized across all users.

## Overview & Impact
Engineered the performant Three.js underwater world to render massive swarms of low-poly fish with vibrant colors and natural movements. Built a robust Python and Node.js backend pipeline that continuously scraped Oceana hashtags in real-time and synchronized new entries via AWS cloud solutions to update the client-side swarm instantly. The accessible low-poly aesthetics created an emotional connection, making the serious topic of overfishing tangible and inviting without feeling explicitly technical.

metadata.title: StopOverfishing (Oceana)
metadata.quote: Every shared social media post adds a unique fish to a real-time, lively virtual ocean.

content:
[PROJECT DETAIL] Woozle Goozle App (Super RTL)
Role: Lead Developer
Year: 2018
Tech Stack: React Native, Unity (LWRP), TensorFlow, Dialogflow
Quote: "Cultivate a conversational friendship with a living 3D digital transformation of the original hand puppet."

## The Problem
Transforming a beloved physical TV hand puppet into a fully interactive digital companion required bypassing traditional static UI to create an authentic conversational bond with children.

## The Solution
An interactive React Native application featuring autonomous voice control via TensorFlow and Dialogflow, seamlessly layered over a Unity-driven virtual 3D environment.

## Overview & Impact
Responsible for the React Native UI components, video logic, and overall application flow control while providing Unity support to integrate the virtual environment. Transitioned the physical hand puppet into a digital 3D character using custom furless shaders, painstakingly imitating original movements. Created a custom dialogue database matching ~1250 unique keywords to over 650 specifically animated sequences, allowing for an ever-expanding conversational experience with seamless lip syncing.

metadata.title: Woozle Goozle App (Super RTL)
metadata.quote: Cultivate a conversational friendship with a living 3D digital transformation of the original hand puppet.
